CustomField.description: Maps to Recurring_Donation__c.StartDate__c on the Recurring Donation during data import processing. Determines when new or updated schedule information (Amount, Day of Month, etc.) takes effect. Defaults to the current date.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the date when schedule changes take effect for this recurring donation. Defaults to today if left blank.
CustomField.label: Recurring Donation Effective Date
